sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58361" key="koilw=nuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοιλ-ῶνυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58361.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hollow-hoofed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἵπποι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
